1500 New Images
2003'3'22 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey people, sorry for the lack of recent updates. I have managed to upload 1500 New anime images to the gallery, there is still alot to come in dew time, maybe a week or two. I hope you enjoy these new images, you can visit them in the gallery, they are in the anime section. I'm also looking at getting a bigger media server for for more images and video clips.

*NEW ANIME CELLS

Whats This!?! An Update!!!
2003'3'20 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Yes people, the title is not a typo... I have made a rather large update... but first I must explain. The staff has been really busy and are in desparate need of a break... so I'll give it to them. I just need you all to bare with us through this little "depression" and please don't lose faith in us. I'll try to update as much as possible, but I got a huge killer project for school... plus my own life, heh.

Anyways... onto today's update. I've added about 9 New Pieces of excellent FanArt into our FanFeed Section. And I've also divided the Fan Art Section up into separate character pages since we've been getting alot of fan art... this will make it easier for you to choose the drawings of the characters you want to see. And I want you all to continue sending in that FanArt, I love looking at it and will put it up for the world to see. So check out our current archive of FanArt / More To Come Later / MG Out...

*Majin Buu Fan Art
*Cell Fan Art
*Freeza Fan Art
*Gohan Fan Art
*Goku Fan Art
*Piccolo Fan Art
*Vegeta Fan Art

Image Gallery
2003'3'19 ++ posted by JamJar
You might have noticed that the image gallery has been working sometimes and not working sometimes for the last couple of days, this is something to do with the host: http://valuehost.co.uk maybe they are doing some repairs or something. Hopefully the dissruption will stop soon and the image gallery will be full working and load quickly.
We are working on an anime section for the image gallery, which contains cells and screenshots from several differnt mangas and animes, this should be openning pretty soon with the first lot of images. As soon as the server starts working again properly, I will start uploading. :)

Out for a bit
2003'3'18 ++ posted by Tricksta
Hey, from now til around the end of May I am going to be really busy with school. I need to pull my grades this last grading period heh. I will try to do a little here and there if I can find time. I'm basically doing what most of the staff is doing. When I come back however, there won't be any more school which means a little more work I will be doing so look foward to that in the meantime. Late', Tricksta out.

Taking a break.
2003'3'17 ++ posted by SMGoten2
Well, I'll also be taking a break, due to reasons that I don't care to discuss. I'll be back sometime, but I don't know when... sorry bout it... I have many problems right now, not to mention that another site I'm working on is opening on April 1st. I probably won't be back for a month or two, so, see ya then

//SMGoten2 out.

Taking a Break
2003'3'14 ++ posted by Kevin Phoenix
Just wanted to let everyone know that I'm taking a break from websites to take care of some real life issues. I should be back in 1 or 2 weeks tops. Everyone needs a break from website work once in a while anyway sooo. Rest assured there's content coming your way as soon as I return. Thanks for your understanding and see ya then!

C++ Tutorial and Free Banners
2003'3'13 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, yes DBGT has been dead for about the last week or so, but I've been extremely busy. So even if the staff did some work... they would be stuck because I couldn't put it up. Well that has all changed this morning! I've finally got around to putting up the content that Legendary Amir sent me. 2 Free Banners and the first C++ Tutorial, all you fans have been craving for. The banners are beautiful, the tutorial is helpful, so go and check it out. Hopefully this is a turning point where DBGT will get more lively.

In some other news, the webmaster over at VBBang who is a good friend of mine is having a really fun and easy contest. Basically he has created a mascot for his site, and he wants you guys to find it a suitable name! If you win there are some cool prizes involved. So go check out that contest over at VBBang or just Click Here.

Also remember to keep voting for us over at the DBAwards for Most Recognized / Thats it for now / MG Out...

*C++ Tutorial
*Free Banners

Draton to the Rescue! Newest Script
2003'3'13 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone, long time no see. Draton's just been busy with life and stuff, and so I haven't updated in a long time. just a quick update here, tricksta sent me in a new movie script for Dragonball Movie 7. Go check it out, it's very interesting and good. MG has also told me he will have some stuff for ya'll tomorrow morning. well i really have got to get going, sorry for not updating in a while / I'll have more content coming up and some projects of my own. Stay tuned ^_^. Draton, signing out..

*Movie 7 Script

Updates Coming Soon
2003'3'11 ++ posted by Legendary Amir
For all of you who are contacting me regarding the Introduction to C++, I just want to say that It is going to be up shortly. Since all you are showing so much interest in this field, I decided to continue making more C++ tutorials, and even opengl tutorials for all your jr. programmers out there. Again, I am sorry for the delay. It will be up any day now.

Whats Going On
2003'3'9 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone... things a little slow here at DBGT. But thats because the staff needs a good break... and that includes me. At this point I would just like to thank the whole staff for the wonderful job that they have done thus far. I'm thankful to have the opportunity to work with all of you.

I've also been getting lots of Fan Fics and Fan Art lately which will be going up as soon as I can find a free moment, so look forward to that. As for the media... sometimes it goes down... so check everyday.

Also, we've been nominated for another awards at the DBAwards. We've been nominated for Most Recognized... currently we're loosing the vote... but you can change that. Vists DBAwards and vote for DBGT in the Most Recognized Category. Thanks everyone, thats it for now / MG Out...

*Vote For Us At The DBAwards!

SITE INFORMATION

Website Bio:.
Site Layout Revision: 10/19/02

Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas

Site Statistics:
Live Stats: 16 users online

NEWS TICKER
Site News: Site upgrades are currently being processed, and can be viewable as progressions are made. Image Gallery is now undergoing constructions, and image additions are being made. Multimedia is on its way, and new information and game reviews are being processed as well.
DB News: PS2 video game information is being scattered among DBZ web sites, and an official trailer has been released. New DBZ series episodes are being aired. More information is soon to come.
Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.
